name: Lemon Poppyseed Cake in a Jar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, cream together the sugar and shortening using an electric mixer.
2. Add eggs and mix well.
3. Incorporate lemon juice, water, lemon rind, extract, and poppy seeds.
4. In a separate large bowl, blend dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt) with a whisk.
5. Gradually add the creamed mixture to the dry ingredients, mixing gently with a spoon.
6. Divide the batter evenly among 7 sterilized, well-greased one-pint wide-mouthed canning jars.
7. Wipe any excess batter from the rims of the jars.
8. Place the jars on a baking sheet and bake in an oven set to 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 55 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Once baked, wipe the rims clean and seal the jars with sterilized lids and rings.
